alert.text: We're deploying upgraded Turbine contracts soon. Open orders will be cancelled at deployment — funds are always safe, but you'll need to re-place orders afterwards.
alert.title: New contracts coming

updates.title: The $1M cap is gone
updates.body: There's no maximum swap size anymore. Turbine was built for large trades — now nothing stops you from making them.

updates.title: Deeper liquidity through Fynd
updates.body: Orders now settle through Fynd's routing engine with wider protocol coverage — including Fluid and Ekubo — so large fills find the best price across more venues.

updates.title: Sharper swap UI
updates.body: Expand the DEX cost breakdown to see exactly what you'd pay elsewhere, pick fill windows from 3 minutes to 30 days, and get pair-specific fee comparisons instead of a flat 15 bps.

updates.title: Instant orders
updates.body: The new "Now" stop fills your order in the very next batch. No waiting, no babysitting.

updates.title: Orders survive updates
updates.body: Open orders now carry over across most Turbine updates instead of being cancelled. Only contract-level migrations still require re-placing orders — and we'll announce those here first.
